question: Which years has the biggest jump?
explanation: Calculate the year-to-year change in Audience_Millions between each pair of consecutive years on the line. Compare these changes to find the largest increase. Select the later year of the pair with the maximum increase.

question: How many years are above the average?
explanation:
Calculate the average of the “Production in million units” values across all years in the chart. 
Compare each year’s bar value to that average. 
Count the years whose production exceeds the average.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "average", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Production in million units"}], "ops2": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Production in million units", "operator": ">", "value": "ref:n1"}], "ops3": [{"op": "count", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": ["n2"], "sentenceIndex": 3}}]}
op_feedback: /op:n1 이후에 average와 각 값을 비교하는 DiffByValue 있어야 함. "Compare each fiscal year’s bar height to that average level."

question: In which year was the agriculture sector the highest
explanation:
Filter the chart to the bars colored for the Agriculture sector. 
Compare the Agriculture segment heights across all years. 
Select the year whose Agriculture segment reaches the greatest height.

question: Which year had the second-lowest value?
explanation: Sort the years by the Operating_Profit_Margin values from lowest to highest. Locate the entry in the second position of that ordered list. Read off the corresponding Year label.

question: in which years does south korea have a bigger value than france?
explanation:
Locate the South Korea and France segments within each stacked bar for every Period. 
Read the Share_of_Import_Value for those two countries in each Period. 
Compare South Korea’s value to France’s value period by period. List the Periods where South Korea’s value is greater.

question: What is the difference between the average of September 1896 until December 1896 and the average of January 1897 until April 1897?
explanation:
Select the four bars from September 1896 through December 1896 and compute their mean fatality rate. 
Select the four bars from January 1897 through April 1897 and compute their mean fatality rate. 
Subtract the earlier-period mean from the later-period mean.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Month/Year", "operator": "between", "value": ["Sep 1896", "Dec 1896"]}, {"op": "average", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Fatality rate among plague cases"}], "ops2": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Month/Year", "operator": "between", "value": ["Jan 1897", "Apr 1897"]}, {"op": "average", "id": "n4", "meta": {"nodeId": "n4", "inputs": ["n3"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Fatality rate among plague cases"}], "ops3": [{"op": "diff", "id": "n5", "meta": {"nodeId": "n5", "inputs": ["n2", "n4"], "sentenceIndex": 3}, "targetA": "ref:n4", "targetB": "ref:n2", "signed": true}]}
viz_feedback: 이 케이스가 chart split이 필요한 경우임. DAG 구조 상 두 ops group(ops, ops2)이 하나의 ops group(ops3)에서 동시에 참조되어 사용되기 때문에, 이런 경우 split view가 필요함.

question: Which city had the biggest jump in population from 2010 to 2025?
explanation: Read the 2010 and 2025 bar heights for each city in the chart. Calculate the population change by subtracting the 2010 value from the 2025 value for every city. Compare these changes across cities. Select the city with the largest increase.

question: Which year had the biggest gap between favor and oppose?
explanation: Compute the absolute difference between the Oppose and Favor percentages for each year. Compare these year-by-year gaps across the chart. Select the year with the largest gap.

question: Find the difference between the average of the first three years of the male group and the average of the last three years of the female group
explanation: Select the male values for the first three years shown on the chart and compute their average. Select the female values for the last three years shown on the chart and compute their average. Subtract the male average from the female average to get the difference.

question: Find the difference between the response with the smallest percentage in the youngest group and the response with the highest percentage in the oldest group
explanation:
Locate the youngest age-group bar (18–29) and read the smallest segment value among its response categories. 
Locate the oldest age-group bar (65+) and read the largest segment value among its response categories. 
Subtract the youngest-group minimum percentage from the oldest-group maximum percentage.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Age Group", "operator": "==", "value": "18–29"}, {"op": "findExtremum", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "which": "min", "field": "Share of respondents"}], "ops2": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Age Group", "operator": "==", "value": "65+"}, {"op": "findExtremum", "id": "n4", "meta": {"nodeId": "n4", "inputs": ["n3"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "which": "max", "field": "Share of respondents"}], "ops3": [{"op": "diff", "id": "n5", "meta": {"nodeId": "n5", "inputs": ["n4", "n2"], "sentenceIndex": 3}, "targetA": "ref:n4", "targetB": "ref:n2", "signed": true}]}

question: Find the difference between the average percentage of even and odd years
explanation: Split the years on the chart into even years and odd years. Average the percentage values for the even-year points and separately average the values for the odd-year points. Subtract the odd-year average from the even-year average to get the difference.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Year", "include": ["2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018"]}, {"op": "average", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Percentage of gross domestic product"}], "ops2": [{"op": "filter", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Year", "include": ["2009", "2011", "2013", "2015", "2017"]}, {"op": "average", "id": "n4", "meta": {"nodeId": "n4", "inputs": ["n3"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "field": "Percentage of gross domestic product"}], "ops3": [{"op": "diff", "id": "n5", "meta": {"nodeId": "n5", "inputs": ["n2", "n4"], "sentenceIndex": 3}, "targetA": "ref:n2", "targetB": "ref:n4", "signed": true}]}

question: For each fiscal year, find the difference between the corresponding year value and the overall average
explanation:
Sum the “Number of days in thousands” values across all fiscal years. 
Divide by the count of fiscal years to get the overall average. 
Subtract that average from each fiscal year’s value to obtain the per-year difference. 
Report the resulting differences for every fiscal year.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "average", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Number of days in thousands"}], "ops2": [{"op": "diffByValue", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "targetValue": "ref:n1", "field": "Number of days in thousands", "signed": true}]}

question: What is the difference between average of maximum payment in all states and average of minimum payment in all states?
explanation:
Collect the bar heights for the Maximum type across all state panels and compute their average. 
Gather the bar heights for the Minimum type across all state panels and compute their average. 
Subtract the minimum-type average from the maximum-type average.

question: What is the Sum of the increases between the two terms for Asian countries (excluding the Middle East)?
explanation: Treat the two terms as the two years shown for each region. Filter the chart to Asian regions and exclude the “Others (including Middle East and other DRI)” region. Subtract the 2011 bar value from the 2017 bar value for each remaining Asian region. Sum those regional increases.

question: What is the Year that has the biggest deviation from the total average?
explanation: Compute the overall average of the Consumer Price Index values across all months shown in the chart. Calculate each year’s average Consumer Price Index using the months that fall in that year. Subtract the overall average from each year’s average and take the absolute value. Compare these deviations and select the year with the largest deviation.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "average", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "field": "Consumer Price Index (100 = 1982-1984)"}], "ops2": [{"op": "diffByValue", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "targetValue": "ref:n1", "field": "Consumer Price Index (100 = 1982-1984)", "signed": false}], "ops3": [{"op": "findExtremum", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": ["n2"], "sentenceIndex": 3}, "which": "max", "field": "Consumer Price Index (100 = 1982-1984)"}]}

question: What is the difference between the year with the smallest difference between Republicans and Democrats and the year with the highest difference?
explanation: Calculate the absolute gap between the Republicans and Democrats values for each year shown in the chart. Select the year where this gap is smallest and the year where this gap is largest. Subtract the earlier year from the later year to get the year difference.
operation_spec: {"ops": [{"op": "pairDiff", "id": "n1", "meta": {"nodeId": "n1", "inputs": [], "sentenceIndex": 1}, "groupA": "Republicans", "groupB": "Democats", "seriesField": "Party", "by": "Year", "field": "Percentage of people negative on China", "absolute": true}], "ops2": [{"op": "findExtremum", "id": "n2", "meta": {"nodeId": "n2", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "which": "min", "field": "Percentage of people negative on China"}, {"op": "findExtremum", "id": "n3", "meta": {"nodeId": "n3", "inputs": ["n1"], "sentenceIndex": 2}, "which": "max", "field": "Percentage of people negative on China"}], "ops3": [{"op": "diff", "id": "n4", "meta": {"nodeId": "n4", "inputs": ["n2", "n3"], "sentenceIndex": 3}, "targetA": "ref:n3", "targetB": "ref:n2", "signed": false}]}
